commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `SystemEvent.audience`, wraps internal queued system events in runtime-context delimiters at drain time, makes heartbeat routing respect that internal lane, and migrates isolated cron awareness events to `audience: "internal"`.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main queues cron awareness as ordinary `trusted: false` system events and the generic drain formats queued events as visible `System:` lines. I did not run a live cron/channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is maintainer judgment on the new core event-audience API plus refreshed or waived current-head real behavior proof, not a narrow automated repair.
